rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Build stage completed with status 'completed' but zero source files were created on disk. Glob confirms no files at expected paths.","scope":"src/utils, src/collections"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Verify actual file existence on disk rather than inferring success from a pipeline status field.","scope":"pipeline"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"A pipeline stage can report 'completed' without any actual work being done — always validate deliverables independently.","scope":"pipeline"}]}
